response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified VTubers as Inugami Korone and another, celebrating the 7th anniversary. 2. Identified two vocal song segments. 3. Song 1: Title 'Imitation' derived from lyrics, artist unknown/original. 4. Song 2: Title 'TEAM TOMODACHI', artist Yuki Chiba. 5. Lyrics for 'TEAM TOMODACHI' found via search. 6. Lyrics for 'Imitation' transcribed from video. 7. Constructed JSON with detected metadata and transcribed/searched lyrics.
response.global_summary: This video features a vocal and dance performance by VTubers Inugami Korone and another VTuber, celebrating Inugami Korone's 7th anniversary. The performance includes an upbeat, original-style song titled 'Imitation' (title derived from its lyrics) and a cover performance of 'TEAM TOMODACHI'.

scenes.description: The VTubers sing and dance to an upbeat song titled 'Imitation'. Text on screen indicates the lyrics.
